notes: Each eval drives the axon4to5-migrate Skill with the event-processor recipe in single mode. Coverage: pure projector (Path A), projector-with-command-dispatch (CommandGateway → CommandDispatcher), YAML+@Bean SequencingPolicy → class-level annotation, EventProcessorDefinition (Spring Path A) wiring, MessagingConfigurer.eventProcessing(...) (native Path B) wiring, custom SequencingPolicy class rewrite, dual-role @EventHandler + @QueryHandler, Rejected (aggregate). Fixtures live in evals/fixtures/ (heroes/, gamerental/, synthetic/) and are shared with the aggregate recipe where applicable.

evals.name: spring-axoniq-pure-projector
evals.prompt:
You are running eval `1: spring-axoniq-pure-projector` for the `axon4to5-migrate` Skill. The Skill lives at `$SKILL_DIR`. Load `$SKILL_DIR/SKILL.md`, `$SKILL_DIR/patterns/ALL_IN_ONE.md`, and (if you need fuller before/after walkthroughs) `$SKILL_DIR/examples/ALL_EXAMPLES.md`.

**Skip SKILL.md Step 1** (the Q1/Q2/Q3 AskUserQuestion prompts) — pin these answers directly: `configuration=spring`, Migration approach **B (AI only)**, `skip-openrewrite=true` (the harness has no Maven/Gradle project and you cannot invoke another Skill recursively). **Skip Step 2.5** progress tracking — there is no project root, just a single workspace directory.

The migration target is the file at `$SOURCE`. Its parent directory `$WORKSPACE/outputs/` is the working directory; treat any `secondary_fixtures` siblings already staged there as additional in-scope files. Migrate every target file IN PLACE.

**Identify the AF4 shapes in `$SOURCE` against `patterns/ALL_IN_ONE.md`** and apply the matching pattern(s). The patterns this eval exercises are: `patterns/30-event-handlers/event-handler-annotation.md`, `patterns/30-event-handlers/namespace-routing.md`, `patterns/30-event-handlers/sequencing-policy.md`, `patterns/30-event-handlers/metadata-type.md`, `patterns/30-event-handlers/metadata-value.md`. Reach for `examples/event-handlers/01-pure-projector-spring.md` when you need a full before/after walkthrough.

**Eval-specific guidance:** DwellingReadModelProjector is a pure read-model projector (@ProcessingGroup + @EventHandler + @ResetHandler, no CommandGateway field, no in-handler dispatch). Apply the event-processor recipe: @ProcessingGroup → @Namespace (same string), AF5 imports for @EventHandler / @ResetHandler / @MetadataValue, plus class-level @SequencingPolicy(type = MetadataSequencingPolicy.class, parameters = GameMetaData.GAME_ID_KEY) because the project's GameConfiguration had a @Bean SequencingPolicy gameIdSequencingPolicy reading the same metadata key. Do NOT introduce CommandDispatcher (pure projection).

Write the `**Result:**` block (per SKILL.md Step 4d) to `$WORKSPACE/outputs/result.md`. Required format: `**Result:** ✅ Success`, followed by `**Recipe:** axon4to5-event-processor` and a `**Notes:**` line summarising what was changed.
evals.expected_output: Source rewritten to AF5: @Namespace, AF5 imports, @SequencingPolicy applied; Result: ✅ Success.
expectations: Result block marks Success with axon4to5-event-processor

Also: @ProcessingGroup → @Namespace, @DisallowReplay AF5 import, @MetaDataValue → @MetadataValue, and class-level @SequencingPolicy(MetadataSequencingPolicy with GameMetaData.GAME_ID_KEY).

Add MessagingConfigurer / EventSourcingConfigurer imports. Drop AF4 DefaultConfigurer / EventProcessingConfigurer / Configurer imports. Do NOT introduce the Spring-only EventProcessorDefinition.

NO EventProcessorDefinition introduced (this is native, not Spring)

evals.name: spring-axoniq-event-bus-to-sink
evals.prompt:
You are running eval `9: spring-axoniq-event-bus-to-sink` for the `axon4to5-migrate` Skill. The Skill lives at `$SKILL_DIR`. Load `$SKILL_DIR/SKILL.md`, `$SKILL_DIR/patterns/ALL_IN_ONE.md`, and (if you need fuller before/after walkthroughs) `$SKILL_DIR/examples/ALL_EXAMPLES.md`.

The migration target is the file at `$SOURCE`. Its parent directory `$WORKSPACE/outputs/` is the working directory; treat any `secondary_fixtures` siblings already staged there as additional in-scope files. Migrate every target file IN PLACE.

**Identify the AF4 shapes in `$SOURCE` against `patterns/ALL_IN_ONE.md`** and apply the matching pattern(s). The pattern this eval exercises is: `patterns/30-event-handlers/event-bus-to-sink.md`.

**Eval-specific guidance:** `ExternalEventPublisher.java` is an AF4 Spring `@RestController` that publishes events to the framework from outside any aggregate, via a constructor-injected `EventBus` field. Apply the event-bus-to-sink pattern: (1) rewrite the import `org.axonframework.eventhandling.EventBus` → `org.axonframework.messaging.eventhandling.EventSink`; (2) also rewrite the import `org.axonframework.eventhandling.GenericEventMessage` → `org.axonframework.messaging.eventhandling.GenericEventMessage`; (3) change the field type and constructor parameter type from `EventBus` to `EventSink`; (4) rename the field/parameter `eventBus` → `eventSink` (conventional, matches the new SPI); (5) rewrite the call site `eventBus.publish(...)` → `eventSink.publish(...)` — the `publish` method shape is unchanged. No AF4 `EventBus` type reference may remain.

Write the `**Result:**` block (per SKILL.md Step 4d) to `$WORKSPACE/outputs/result.md`. Required format: `**Result:** ✅ Success`, followed by `**Recipe:** axon4to5-event-processor` and a `**Notes:**` line summarising what was changed.
evals.expected_output: ExternalEventPublisher.java rewritten: EventBus renamed to EventSink under org.axonframework.messaging.eventhandling; field/parameter renamed eventBus → eventSink; call site updated to eventSink.publish(...); AF4 imports removed; Result: ✅ Success.
expectations: Result block marks Success with axon4to5-event-processor
